title: Looking for Teacher at IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Looking for Teacher at IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Dhanbad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services:
IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Kozhikode Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
